descriptions.find: Search files and directories; destructive flags like -delete or -exec rm should be policy-gated.
descriptions.find -delete: Destructive find variant that removes matched paths.
descriptions.find -exec rm: Destructive find variant invoking rm via -exec.
descriptions.xargs: Build and run commands from stdin input; destructive forms such as xargs rm should be policy-gated.
descriptions.xargs rm: Destructive wrapper that executes rm for piped/path input.
descriptions.xargs -0 rm: Destructive wrapper variant using NUL-separated input.
descriptions.do rm: Shell-loop destructive pattern (for/while ... do rm ... done).
descriptions.launchctl: Manage macOS launch agents and daemons.
descriptions.diskutil erasedisk: Erase an entire disk on macOS.

descriptions.find: Search files and directories; destructive flags like -delete or -exec rm should be policy-gated.
descriptions.xargs: Build and run commands from stdin input; destructive forms such as xargs rm should be policy-gated.
descriptions.find -delete: Destructive find variant that removes matched paths.

descriptions.xargs rm: Destructive wrapper that executes rm for piped/path input.

descriptions.git clone: Download repository content into local workspace.
descriptions.git push: Upload local commits to remote repository.
descriptions.git reset --hard: Discard local changes and reset branch state.

descriptions.mail: Send messages via local/system mail transport.
descriptions.mailx: Send or process email from command line.
descriptions.sendmail: Directly invoke MTA to send outbound email.
descriptions.wget: Fetch content from URLs over network.
